title: Create: Bliss
description: yet another create with addons modpack
body:
![cool title graphic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a0129cc0063e219978e731fb9de935e60266ad5.png) What's this? another create and addons modpack? yes it is :] It is a compilation of many different popular create addons, and a couple exploration mods too!
Create addons Create Central Kitchen & Slice And Dice
Create Deco
Create Enchantment Industry
Create Guardian Beam Defense
Create Mechanical Extruder
Create Mechanical Spawner
Create Armory
Create Copycats+ & framed
Create New Age
Create Numismatics
Create Steam 'n' Rails
Create The Factory Must Grow
Rechiseled: Create
Adventure Mods Terralith
Incendium
Nullscape
Yungs Better... Everything?
Ender Dragon Fight Remastered
Quality of Life Mods EMI
Farmers Delight
Leaves Be Gone
And Of course, many, many, many performance mods
~~I just downloaded them off of the first two pages of modrinth and it somehow worked~~
